name: Variable.Value
description: Returns the value of the specified variable `identifier` defined by the current evaluation environment. If the variable is not defined, an error is raised.

name: Variable.ValueOrDefault
signature: Variable.ValueOrDefault(identifier as text, optional defaultValue as any) as any
description: Returns the value of the specified variable `identifier` defined by the current evaluation environment. If the variable is not defined, the optional `defaultValue` is returned.
